shortDescription.text: Current compareProfiles percentage is too coarse for the new Western-only product and must not be reused.
Current unknown-time path substitutes 12:00 and therefore needs a relationship-specific uncertainty model.
Current synastry route has no required second-person consent assertion.
Product dimensions are not yet evidence-backed as a reusable API standard.
Real-boundary behavior remains unverified until staging smoke executes.
The new analysis should not trust raw Person-A data when the MVP promise is an owned stored profile boundary.
The existing compute limiter does not automatically cover a new /api/relationships path unless explicitly added.

message.text: Current compareProfiles percentage is too coarse for the new Western-only product and must not be reused. Prohibit import and add no-score DOM/static tests.

properties.impact: Would present a misleading verdict and mix BaZi with Western scope.

message.text: Current unknown-time path substitutes 12:00 and therefore needs a relationship-specific uncertainty model. Use exact/approximate/unknown union and sampled stability.

properties.impact: Could make uncertain Moon/angle outputs appear exact.

message.text: Current synastry route has no required second-person consent assertion. Add BFF 422 gate and explicit non-verification wording.

properties.impact: A caller can start pair analysis without even attesting permission.

message.text: Product dimensions are not yet evidence-backed as a reusable API standard. Keep versioned frontend config and defer API promotion to API-001.

properties.impact: Premature API standardization would increase migration cost.

message.text: Real-boundary behavior remains unverified until staging smoke executes. Run the first browser E2E against actual profile and FuFirE boundaries and record request ID.

properties.impact: Static, unit or process-local integration tests cannot support a real-function claim.

message.text: The new analysis should not trust raw Person-A data when the MVP promise is an owned stored profile boundary. Accept personAProfileId, resolve with id + user_id, return 404 and make zero upstream calls on mismatch.

properties.impact: A caller could bypass profile ownership and the real-boundary test would validate the wrong trust model.

message.text: The existing compute limiter does not automatically cover a new /api/relationships path unless explicitly added. Add the path to the compute limiter and test 429 before fan-out.

properties.impact: One request can fan out to six paid upstream calls, increasing abuse and cost exposure.
